titleStmt.title: SII 8.751: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 751. (A.R. No. 435 of 1903). ON THE WEST WALL OF THE SAME PRAKARA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . svasti samastabhuvanekavira candrakulamaṅ(ku)galapradīpa madhurāpurīmahendra keraḷakulakāḷāndhakāradivākara coḷavamśavārirāśibāḍabānala laṅkāpatikāḷakūṭakadanakāḷakaṇṭha ka[rṇṇāṭakarikaḷabha[kaṇḍirava] kṣemāsuravidāraṇa narasiṁ ha kāṭhakavamśavaiśvānara ja[yan=ta]maṅgalapuravarādhīśvara vīrakaṇḍagopālabhujaṅga[ vihaṅga] rāja kāñcīpuraviracitasā
mrājjyābhiṣeka gaṇapatigandhagajakūṭapākala ba huvidhavairidurggabhañjana praṇatarājastāpanācāryya tribhuvanarājādhirāja parameśvara śrīvikramapāṇḍiyadeva naṭuvilmaṇṭalattu Uṭaiyār Aḻakiyanāyaṉār koyil tāṉattārkku . Uṭaiyār tiruvāmāttūruṭaiyār Aḻakiyanāyaṉārkku namperāl kaṭṭiṉa vikkiramapāṇṭiyaṉcantikku Amutu
paṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa nitta nimantaṅkaḷukkum puraṭṭātimātattil nam piṟantanāḷile tirttampiracātam Eḻuntaruḷum vikkiramapāṇṭiyaṉtirunāḷukku tevatāṉaiṟaiyiliyākac centamaṅkalappaṟṟu kāṭavarātittaṉperuvaḻikkuk kiḻakku muñciyāṟṟukku vaṭakkupaṭṭa paṟṟil viḻuppuramāṉa caṉṉātacca
ruppetimaṅkalattu Aiñcāvatuvaraiyum Aṭaippu niṅkalāṉa taricunilattu viṭṭa tiruvāmāttūr Ellaikkuk kiḻakkuc ceyattāṅkikālukku vaṭakkupaṭṭa nilattile tamaceri Eṇpatumāṉilam kaṭamai poṉvari kācāyavarkkam kār puṉpayir cittiraikkār veṭṭi ṉilaiāḷ kāt
tikaippoṉvari paṇakkottup pāṭikāval kaṇakkappeṟu kāṇiyāḷapperu vācalviṉiyokam Eval Eḻuttuviṉivokam cekkukāṇikkai tulāpararavari kūṟṟilakkai kaṭaikkūṭṭu Ilakkai taṇṭalilakkai viṭaipper mātappaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa Aṉaittāyavaṟkkamum Uṭpaṭṭa Iṉṉilam Eṇpatumāvum Āṟāvatu Āvaṇimātamu
tal Iṟaiyiliyākat tantom . Ippaṭikku Ivvolai piṭipāṭākakoṇṭu cantirātittavaṟ celvatāka kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭikkoḷka . Ippaṭikkut tiruveḻuttu .
Ivai pāṇṭimaṇṭalattuc cempināṭṭu maruṅkūruṭaiyāṉ vaṭakopuramuṭaiyāṉ
karapuramuṭai Eḻuttu . paḻantiparāyaṉ Eḻuttu . taccāḻvāṉ Āṉa rāyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 8.751 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
